# Ping from agentry

This file was written and PR'd by the agentry shipper role end-to-end on 2026-04-23. If you're reading it in a PR, M7 is green.
payload.commit_msg: m7: first PR opened by agentry shipper role
payload.pr_title: M7 — first PR shipped by agentry end-to-end
payload.pr_body: Opened by the `shipper` role in team `shipper-solo-team`. Contains one new file `pings/m7.md`. Physics: shipper is the only role in the team with forge-write scope; all other roles are gitless.
